sc_category.description: Financial limit change requests for paid applications
sc_category.full_description: Submit requests to increase the monetary cap on your paid application beyond the default $100 limit. Requests are routed to the appropriate executive for approval based on the requested amount.
sc_category.title: Financial Limit Requests

sc_cat_item.description:
Use this form to request an increase to your paid application's monetary cap beyond the default $100 limit.

  • $200 cap — Requires GVP approval
  • $300 cap — Requires SVP approval
  • $500 cap — Requires VP approval

Your request will be automatically routed to the correct approver. Once approved (with comments), your RITM will be updated accordingly.
sc_cat_item.fulfillment_instructions: Route this RITM through the Money Increase Approval Flow. The flow will identify the correct approver based on the requested cap amount and update the RITM upon approval.
sc_cat_item.mobile_subtitle: Increase app monetary cap - requires executive approval
sc_cat_item.name: Money Increase Request
sc_cat_item.short_description: Request an increase to your paid app's monetary cap (beyond $100 default)

item_option_new.description: Select the new maximum monetary cap you require for your application. Note: your current cap is $100.
item_option_new.help_text: Choose the cap level that meets your business need. Higher caps require more senior approvals.
item_option_new.name: requested_cap_amount
item_option_new.question_text: Select the new cap amount you are requesting:

item_option_new.description: Provide a clear business justification for why you need the increased monetary cap.
item_option_new.help_text: Explain the business reason for needing a higher cap. Include project name, team, and expected usage.
item_option_new.name: business_justification
item_option_new.question_text: Provide your business justification for this cap increase:

item_option_new.description: The name of the paid application for which you are requesting the cap increase.
item_option_new.help_text: Enter the exact name of your paid application.
item_option_new.name: application_name
item_option_new.question_text: What is the name of the paid application?

sys_script_include.description: Helper utility for the Money Increase Approval Flow. Determines the correct approver role based on requested cap amount and updates the RITM upon approval.
sys_script_include.name: MoneyIncreaseHelper

sys_hub_flow.description: Handles the approval routing for Money Increase Requests. Routes to GVP ($200), SVP ($300), or VP ($500) based on the requested cap amount. Updates the RITM with approval comments on completion.
sys_hub_flow.label: Money Increase Approval Flow
sys_hub_flow.name: money_increase_approval_flow

sys_hub_step.annotation: Retrieve catalog variables (requested_cap_amount, business_justification, application_name) from the triggered RITM.
sys_hub_step.label: Get Catalog Variables from RITM
sys_hub_step.name: get_catalog_variables
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Money Increase Approval Flow - Get Catalog Variables from RITM

sys_hub_step.annotation: Evaluate the requested cap amount and route to the appropriate approver: GVP ($200), SVP ($300), or VP ($500).
sys_hub_step.label: Route to Appropriate Approver
sys_hub_step.name: route_to_approver
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Money Increase Approval Flow - Route to Appropriate Approver

sys_hub_step.annotation: Request approval from GVP. The approver must provide comments before approving or rejecting. This step uses the "Ask for Approval" action targeting users with the GVP title.

input.name: approval_field
input.value: Approve Money Increase to $200 for application: {{steps.get_catalog_variables.application_name}}

sys_hub_step.label: GVP Approval - Request $200 Cap
sys_hub_step.name: gvp_approval
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Money Increase Approval Flow - GVP Approval Request $200 Cap

sys_hub_step.annotation: Request approval from SVP. The approver must provide comments before approving or rejecting. Targets users with the SVP title.

input.name: approval_field
input.value: Approve Money Increase to $300 for application: {{steps.get_catalog_variables.application_name}}

sys_hub_step.label: SVP Approval - Request $300 Cap
sys_hub_step.name: svp_approval
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Money Increase Approval Flow - SVP Approval Request $300 Cap

sys_hub_step.annotation: Request approval from VP. The approver must provide comments before approving or rejecting. Targets users with the VP title.

input.name: approval_field
input.value: Approve Money Increase to $500 for application: {{steps.get_catalog_variables.application_name}}

sys_hub_step.label: VP Approval - Request $500 Cap
sys_hub_step.name: vp_approval
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Money Increase Approval Flow - VP Approval Request $500 Cap

sys_hub_step.annotation: On approval, update the RITM with approver comments, set approval state to Approved, and set state to Closed Complete.
sys_hub_step.label: Update RITM on Approval
sys_hub_step.name: update_ritm_on_approval
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Money Increase Approval Flow - Update RITM on Approval

sys_hub_step.annotation: On rejection, update the RITM with rejection comments and set state to Rejected.
sys_hub_step.label: Update RITM on Rejection
sys_hub_step.name: update_ritm_on_rejection
sys_hub_step.sys_name: Money Increase Approval Flow - Update RITM on Rejection

sc_cat_item_delivery_plan.sys_name: Money Increase Request - Money Increase Approval Flow

sysevent_email_action.description: Notification sent to the approver when a Money Increase Request needs their approval.
sysevent_email_action.message_html:
Approval Required: Money Increase Request

Dear ${approver.name},

A Money Increase Request has been submitted and requires your approval.

Request Details
RITM Number ${document.number}
Requested By ${document.request.requested_for.name}
Application Name ${document.variables.application_name}
Current Cap $100 (default)
Requested Cap $${document.variables.requested_cap_amount}
Business Justification ${document.variables.business_justification}
⚠ Important: You must provide comments when approving or rejecting this request.
Review Request
This is an automated notification from ServiceNow. Please do not reply to this email.
sysevent_email_action.name: Money Increase Request - Approval Notification
sysevent_email_action.subject: Action Required: Money Increase Request ${document.number} - ${document.variables.application_name} ($${document.variables.requested_cap_amount} cap)

sysevent_email_action.description: Notification sent to the requester when their Money Increase Request is approved.
sysevent_email_action.message:
Dear ${requested_for.name},
Your Money Increase Request has been APPROVED.
REQUEST DETAILS --------------- RITM Number : ${number} Application : ${variables.application_name} Approved Cap : $${variables.requested_cap_amount} Previous Cap : $100
Please check the RITM work notes for full details including the approver's comments.
Thank you, ServiceNow Automated Notification
sysevent_email_action.message_html:
✓ Money Increase Request Approved

Dear ${requested_for.name},

Great news! Your Money Increase Request has been APPROVED.

Approval Details
RITM Number ${number}
Application Name ${variables.application_name}
Previous Cap $100
Approved New Cap $${variables.requested_cap_amount}

Please view the RITM for full approval details and comments from your approver.

View Request
This is an automated notification from ServiceNow. Please do not reply to this email.
sysevent_email_action.name: Money Increase Request - Approved Notification
sysevent_email_action.subject: Approved: Money Increase Request ${number} - ${variables.application_name} (New cap: $${variables.requested_cap_amount})

sysevent_email_action.description: Notification sent to the requester when their Money Increase Request is rejected.
sysevent_email_action.message:
Dear ${requested_for.name},
Your Money Increase Request has been REJECTED.
REQUEST DETAILS --------------- RITM Number : ${number} Application : ${variables.application_name} Requested Cap : $${variables.requested_cap_amount}
Please check the RITM work notes for the rejection reason and approver comments. If you have questions, please contact your manager.
Thank you, ServiceNow Automated Notification
sysevent_email_action.message_html:
✗ Money Increase Request Rejected

Dear ${requested_for.name},

Unfortunately, your Money Increase Request has been REJECTED.

Request Details
RITM Number ${number}
Application Name ${variables.application_name}
Requested Cap $${variables.requested_cap_amount}

Please view the RITM for the rejection reason and comments from your approver. Contact your manager if you have further questions.

View Request
This is an automated notification from ServiceNow. Please do not reply to this email.
sysevent_email_action.name: Money Increase Request - Rejected Notification
sysevent_email_action.subject: Rejected: Money Increase Request ${number} - ${variables.application_name}
